query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed Disability Rights Maryland About page now preserves designated Protection & Advocacy language.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Maryland is Maryland’s designated Protection & Advocacy agency and is federally mandated to advance the civil rights of people with disabilities. DRM provides free legal services to Marylanders of any age with all types of disabilities.

query_basis: Reviewed Parents’ Place of Maryland About page now preserves explicit PTI designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: Parents’ Place supports families of children with disabilities and special health care needs. Serving as Maryland’s Parent Training and Information Center and Family-to-Family Health Information Center, Parents’ Place supports thousands of Maryland families each year.

query_basis: Reviewed Maryland Legal Aid homepage now preserves direct statewide free civil legal services evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: Maryland Legal Aid provides a full range of free civil legal services to financially eligible individuals from 12 office locations and preserves direct statewide Get Free Legal Help intake on the public page.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-23 official Maryland DHS Local Offices root now enumerates every county-equivalent local office leaf directly, replacing the old generic statewide-location blocker.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DHS Local Offices page lists 24 county-equivalent links, one for each Maryland county or Baltimore City, including Allegany County, Montgomery County, Prince George's County, and Baltimore City.
The Allegany County leaf page is titled 'Allegany County - Maryland Department of Human Services' and exposes county-specific office contact details including address, phone, email, and hours.
The Montgomery County leaf page is titled 'Montgomery County - Maryland Department of Human Services' and preserves county-specific office contact details including address, phone, email, and hours.
